requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency MEPS — Household Refrigerating Appliances (SASO 2663 / SASO 2892)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效MEPS——家用制冷器具（SASO 2663 / SASO 2892）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效MEPS——家用製冷器具（SASO 2663 / SASO 2892）

summary.en: Saudi Arabia sets minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) for household refrigerating appliances through SASO 2663 and the updated SASO 2892 (Energy efficiency, labelling and minimum energy performance requirements for refrigerators, refrigerator-freezers and freezers). These MEPS are among the world's strictest for refrigerators because they are calibrated for high-ambient Gulf operating conditions and are enforced as a market-access gate via SABER. Key requirements include: (1) a minimum Energy Efficiency Ratio / maximum allowable annual energy consumption derived from rated volume, climate class and a reference-consumption formula set out in the standard; (2) testing under high-ambient conditions reflecting the Saudi climate (T-class, ambient up to 43 °C) — temperate-climate (e.g., 25 °C) test data does not demonstrate compliance; (3) an energy efficiency rating (star/grade scale) that must appear on the SEEC energy label; and (4) entry of the model's technical parameters and energy data into the technical file supporting the Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) on SABER. Models that do not meet the SASO 2892 MEPS threshold cannot obtain a PCoC and cannot be placed on the Saudi market.
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯通过SASO 2663及更新版SASO 2892（电冰箱、冰箱-冷冻箱及冷冻箱的能效、标识和最低能效要求）为家用制冷器具设定最低能效标准（MEPS）。这些MEPS是全球对冰箱最严格的标准之一，因其针对海湾高环境温度运行条件校准，并作为市场准入门槛通过SABER执行。核心要求包括：（1）依据额定容积、气候等级及标准规定的参考耗电量公式得出的最低能效比/最大允许年耗电量；（2）须在反映沙特气候的高环境温度条件下测试（T类，环境温度最高43°C）——温带气候（如25°C）测试数据不能证明合规；（3）须在SEEC能效标签上显示的能效评级（星级/等级）；（4）将型号的技术参数及能效数据录入支撑SABER上产品符合性证书（PCoC）的技术文件。不满足SASO 2892 MEPS门槛的型号无法取得PCoC，亦不得投放沙特市场。
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯通過SASO 2663及更新版SASO 2892（電冰箱、冰箱-冷凍箱及冷凍箱的能效、標識和最低能效要求）為家用製冷器具設定最低能效標準（MEPS）。這些MEPS是全球對冰箱最嚴格的標準之一，因其針對海灣高環境溫度運行條件校準，並作為市場准入門檻通過SABER執行。核心要求包括：（1）依據額定容積、氣候等級及標準規定的參考耗電量公式得出的最低能效比/最大允許年耗電量；（2）須在反映沙特氣候的高環境溫度條件下測試（T類，環境溫度最高43°C）——溫帶氣候（如25°C）測試數據不能證明合規；（3）須在SEEC能效標籤上顯示的能效評級（星級/等級）；（4）將型號的技術參數及能效數據錄入支撐SABER上產品符合性證書（PCoC）的技術文件。不滿足SASO 2892 MEPS門檻的型號無法取得PCoC，亦不得投放沙特市場。

standards_or_laws: SASO 2892 — Energy efficiency, labelling and minimum energy performance requirements for refrigerators, refrigerator-freezers and freezers (updated MEPS; high-ambient calibrated)
SASO 2663 — Energy efficiency requirements / labelling for refrigerating appliances (earlier MEPS edition)
IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (basis for measurement, applied at high-ambient/T-class conditions)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It establishes energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits. The standard is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the energy labelling system administered by the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC). Products must display the China Energy Label (CEL) before sale. The GB 12021.2 framework uses a different test methodology and is benchmarked to temperate operating conditions, whereas SASO 2892 is calibrated for high-ambient Gulf conditions — Chinese energy grades and Saudi MEPS results are not directly comparable.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。GB 12021.2为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由国家发展和改革委员会（NDRC）管理。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的试验方法以温带运行条件为基准，而SASO 2892针对海湾高环境温度条件校准——中国能效等级与沙特MEPS结果不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。GB 12021.2為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）管理。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的試驗方法以溫帶運行條件為基準，而SASO 2892針對海灣高環境溫度條件校準——中國能效等級與沙特MEPS結果不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Three major gaps exist between Chinese energy compliance and Saudi MEPS: (1) High-ambient test conditions — SASO 2892 is tested at high-ambient (T-class, up to 43 °C) conditions reflecting the Gulf climate, which is substantially more demanding than the temperate conditions underlying GB 12021.2. A Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does NOT guarantee compliance with the SASO 2892 MEPS threshold; the appliance must be re-tested or re-rated under Saudi conditions. (2) Different MEPS framework — SASO 2892 specifies its own minimum-performance formula and energy rating scale; the Chinese 1–5 grade does not map onto it. (3) SABER/PCoC gate — the model's energy data must be embedded in the technical file underlying the Product Certificate of Conformity; a non-compliant model cannot be registered on SABER and therefore cannot be imported. Measurement to the IEC 62552 series at high-ambient conditions is required.
gap.zh: 中国能效合规与沙特MEPS之间存在三大差距：（1）高环境温度测试条件——SASO 2892在反映海湾气候的高环境温度（T类，最高43°C）条件下测试，远比GB 12021.2所基于的温带条件苛刻。中国1级或2级评定不等同于符合SASO 2892 MEPS门槛；器具须在沙特条件下重新测试或重新评级。（2）MEPS框架不同——SASO 2892规定了自有的最低性能公式和能效评级体系；中国1–5级与之不对应。（3）SABER/PCoC门槛——型号能效数据须嵌入支撑产品符合性证书的技术文件；不合规型号无法在SABER注册，因而无法进口。须依据IEC 62552系列在高环境温度条件下进行测量。
gap.zht: 中國能效合規與沙特MEPS之間存在三大差距：（1）高環境溫度測試條件——SASO 2892在反映海灣氣候的高環境溫度（T類，最高43°C）條件下測試，遠比GB 12021.2所基於的溫帶條件苛刻。中國1級或2級評定不等同於符合SASO 2892 MEPS門檻；器具須在沙特條件下重新測試或重新評級。（2）MEPS框架不同——SASO 2892規定了自有的最低性能公式和能效評級體系；中國1–5級與之不對應。（3）SABER/PCoC門檻——型號能效數據須嵌入支撐產品符合性證書的技術文件；不合規型號無法在SABER註冊，因而無法進口。須依據IEC 62552系列在高環境溫度條件下進行測量。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — compliance with the SASO 2892 (and predecessor SASO 2663) MEPS threshold is legally required before Saudi market placement; enforced as a precondition for the SABER Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SASO 2892 / SASO 2663 MEPS are legally binding for Saudi market placement of household refrigerators and are among the world's strictest, being calibrated for high-ambient Gulf conditions. Chinese GB 12021.2 energy grades do not substitute — measurement to IEC 62552 at high-ambient (T-class) conditions and re-rating to the SASO MEPS framework are required. A model failing the SASO 2892 threshold cannot obtain a PCoC on SABER and cannot legally be imported.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SASO 2892 / SASO 2663 MEPS对家用电冰箱在沙特市场投放具有法律约束力，且因针对海湾高环境温度条件校准而属全球最严格之列。中国GB 12021.2能效等级不能替代——须依据IEC 62552在高环境温度（T类）条件下测量并按SASO MEPS框架重新评级。不达SASO 2892门槛的型号无法在SABER取得PCoC，亦无法合法进口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SASO 2892 / SASO 2663 MEPS對家用電冰箱在沙特市場投放具有法律約束力，且因針對海灣高環境溫度條件校準而屬全球最嚴格之列。中國GB 12021.2能效等級不能替代——須依據IEC 62552在高環境溫度（T類）條件下測量並按SASO MEPS框架重新評級。不達SASO 2892門檻的型號無法在SABER取得PCoC，亦無法合法進口。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Saudi SEEC Energy Label + SABER Registration
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——沙特SEEC能效标签 + SABER注册
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——沙特SEEC能效標籤 + SABER註冊

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Saudi market must bear the Saudi energy efficiency label developed under the Saudi Energy Efficiency Center (SEEC) programme and adopted through SASO 2892 / SASO 2663. The SEEC energy label displays the appliance's energy efficiency rating (star/grade scale), rated annual energy consumption, total/compartment volumes, and the model identifier, in Arabic. The label rating must be substantiated by high-ambient (T-class) test data per the SASO MEPS standard. Before the goods can be imported, the Saudi importer must register the product model on the SABER platform, obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) confirming MEPS and labelling compliance, and then obtain a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) for each consignment. The SEEC label artwork must be affixed to the appliance for retail sale in Saudi Arabia.
summary.zh: 投放沙特市场的家用制冷器具须附贴依据沙特能效中心（SEEC）项目制定、并通过SASO 2892 / SASO 2663采用的沙特能效标签。SEEC能效标签以阿拉伯文显示器具的能效评级（星级/等级）、额定年耗电量、总容积/隔间容积及型号标识符。标签评级须由依据SASO MEPS标准的高环境温度（T类）测试数据支撑。货物进口前，沙特进口商须在SABER平台注册产品型号，取得确认MEPS及标识合规的产品符合性证书（PCoC），再为每批货物取得货物符合性证书（SCoC）。SEEC标签图样须加贴于器具，以在沙特零售销售。
summary.zht: 投放沙特市場的家用製冷器具須附貼依據沙特能效中心（SEEC）項目制定、並通過SASO 2892 / SASO 2663採用的沙特能效標籤。SEEC能效標籤以阿拉伯文顯示器具的能效評級（星級/等級）、額定年耗電量、總容積/隔間容積及型號識別符。標籤評級須由依據SASO MEPS標準的高環境溫度（T類）測試數據支撐。貨物進口前，沙特進口商須在SABER平台註冊產品型號，取得確認MEPS及標識合規的產品符合性證書（PCoC），再為每批貨物取得貨物符合性證書（SCoC）。SEEC標籤圖樣須加貼於器具，以在沙特零售銷售。

standards_or_laws: SASO 2892 / SASO 2663 — energy efficiency labelling provisions for refrigerating appliances (SEEC energy label format and rating scale)
Saudi Energy Efficiency Center (SEEC) — energy labelling programme
SABER platform (saber.sa) — mandatory product registration and Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) before import

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is governed by the China Energy Label (CEL) system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, revised 2016). The China Energy Label displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption, in Chinese. Labels are administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR. Manufacturers self-declare grade based on testing against GB 12021.2 under temperate conditions. The Chinese CEL label and the Saudi SEEC label are structurally different, use different rating scales, are in different languages, and are based on different (temperate vs high-ambient) test conditions — they are not cross-comparable and the CEL cannot serve as the Saudi label.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识制度依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订版）实施，采用中国能效标识（CEL）体系，以中文展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量。标识由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2在温带条件下检测结果自我声明能效等级。中国CEL标识与沙特SEEC标签在结构、评级体系、语言及测试条件（温带 vs 高环境温度）上均不同——两者不可直接比较，CEL不能充当沙特标签。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識制度依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂版）實施，採用中國能效標識（CEL）體系，以中文展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量。標識由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2在溫帶條件下檢測結果自我聲明能效等級。中國CEL標識與沙特SEEC標籤在結構、評級體系、語言及測試條件（溫帶 vs 高環境溫度）上均不同——兩者不可直接比較，CEL不能充當沙特標籤。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two mandatory actions with no usable Chinese equivalent: (1) SABER registration + PCoC — each model must be registered on the SABER platform and obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity confirming SASO 2892 MEPS and SEEC labelling compliance before import; the Saudi importer (not the Chinese manufacturer) holds the PCoC, and a per-shipment SCoC is then required for customs clearance at ports such as Jeddah and Dammam. (2) Saudi SEEC energy label — the Arabic-language SEEC label, with a rating substantiated by high-ambient (T-class) test data, must be affixed to the product for retail sale. The Chinese CEL label cannot be re-used: it is in Chinese, uses a different rating scale, and reflects temperate (not high-ambient) test conditions. Failure to register on SABER or to apply the SEEC label is a market-access blocker — goods will not clear customs without a valid SCoC.
gap.zh: 两项强制性要求在中国无可用对应：（1）SABER注册 + PCoC——每款型号须在SABER平台注册并取得确认SASO 2892 MEPS及SEEC标识合规的产品符合性证书，方可进口；PCoC由沙特进口商（而非中国制造商）持有，随后每批货物须取得SCoC方可在吉达、达曼等港口清关。（2）沙特SEEC能效标签——须将阿拉伯文SEEC标签（评级由高环境温度（T类）测试数据支撑）加贴于产品以供零售。中国CEL标签不能复用：其为中文、采用不同评级体系、且反映温带（非高环境温度）测试条件。未在SABER注册或未加贴SEEC标签将构成市场准入障碍——无有效SCoC货物不能清关。
gap.zht: 兩項強制性要求在中國無可用對應：（1）SABER註冊 + PCoC——每款型號須在SABER平台註冊並取得確認SASO 2892 MEPS及SEEC標識合規的產品符合性證書，方可進口；PCoC由沙特進口商（而非中國製造商）持有，隨後每批貨物須取得SCoC方可在吉達、達曼等港口清關。（2）沙特SEEC能效標籤——須將阿拉伯文SEEC標籤（評級由高環境溫度（T類）測試數據支撐）加貼於產品以供零售。中國CEL標籤不能複用：其為中文、採用不同評級體系、且反映溫帶（非高環境溫度）測試條件。未在SABER註冊或未加貼SEEC標籤將構成市場准入障礙——無有效SCoC貨物不能清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SABER registration, Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC), per-shipment SCoC, and SEEC energy label display are legally required before Saudi market placement under the SASO/SABER regime
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: SABER platform / Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO) / Saudi Energy Efficiency Center (SEEC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SABER registration with a Product Certificate of Conformity, per-shipment SCoC, and the Arabic SEEC energy label are mandatory hard gates for Saudi market access for household refrigerators. Chinese exporters must support their Saudi importer in completing SABER/PCoC registration (with high-ambient IEC 62552 measurement and SASO MEPS rating) before any unit enters the Saudi market. The Chinese CEL label does not satisfy Saudi labelling obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SABER注册（含产品符合性证书）、每批货物SCoC及阿拉伯文SEEC能效标签是家用电冰箱进入沙特市场的强制性门槛。中国出口商须协助其沙特进口商在任何产品进入沙特市场前完成SABER/PCoC注册（含高环境温度IEC 62552测量及SASO MEPS评级）。中国CEL标识不满足沙特标识义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SABER註冊（含產品符合性證書）、每批貨物SCoC及阿拉伯文SEEC能效標籤是家用電冰箱進入沙特市場的強制性門檻。中國出口商須協助其沙特進口商在任何產品進入沙特市場前完成SABER/PCoC註冊（含高環境溫度IEC 62552測量及SASO MEPS評級）。中國CEL標識不滿足沙特標識義務。
